/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/mecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mecanumbot_msgs/msg/detail/sensor_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mecanumbot_msgs/msg/detail/access_motor_cmd__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mecanumbot_msgs/msg/detail/open_cr_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mecanumbot_msgs/srv/detail/get_led_status__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/mecanumbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/mecanumbot_msgs/srv/detail/set_led_status__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
